title: Fix Admin Reset (Anbarı Sıfırla) — wire up backend resetInventory function

requirements.summary: Update ResetInventory.tsx to call the backend resetInventory function after password and confirmation, showing Azerbaijani success/error messages
acceptanceCriteria: ResetInventory.tsx no longer shows the 'Bu funksiya hal-hazırda mövcud deyil' notice
After correct password entry and confirmation, the frontend calls the backend resetInventory function
A success message is displayed in Azerbaijani (e.g., 'Anbar uğurla sıfırlandı') upon a successful reset
An error message is shown in Azerbaijani if the backend call fails
After reset, stock levels reflect 0 for all products when viewed in the inventory screen

file_operations.description: Replace the placeholder notice with a confirmation dialog and reset logic. After the user passes the PasswordGate and confirms the reset action, call the useResetInventory mutation hook. Display 'Anbar uğurla sıfırlandı' on success and an appropriate error message in Azerbaijani on failure. Remove the 'Bu funksiya hal-hazırda mövcud deyil' text entirely.

requirements.summary: Add useResetInventory mutation hook that calls backend resetInventory and invalidates relevant queries on success
acceptanceCriteria: It calls the backend actor's resetInventory function as a mutation
On success, it invalidates stockLevels, salesHistory, and zReport queries
ResetInventory.tsx uses this hook to trigger the reset

file_operations.description: Add and export a useResetInventory mutation hook using useMutation from TanStack Query. The mutation function should call actor.resetInventory(). On success, invalidate the 'stockLevels', 'salesHistory', and 'zReport' query keys using queryClient.invalidateQueries to ensure all dependent screens reflect the updated (zeroed) inventory state.
